evals.prompt: Create a set of requirements for the thermal subsystem of a lunar rover. It must survive the lunar night (-170C) and operate during the day up to 120C. It needs a radiator and survival heaters. The survival heaters must draw no more than 15W. Save the requirements in skills/requirements-manager/evals/test-requirements/
evals.expected_output: Markdown files created in skills/requirements-manager/evals/test-requirements/ with properly formatted requirement blocks.

evals.prompt: We just changed the thermal design. Update the survival heater requirement located in skills/requirements-manager/evals/test-requirements/ to allow up to 20W of power draw instead of 15W. Add a note to the history.
evals.expected_output: The requirement block for the survival heater in the sandbox directory is updated with 20W and a history note is added.

evals.prompt: Run a traceability audit on the thermal requirements located in skills/requirements-manager/evals/test-requirements/. Provide me a list of all orphan requirements.
evals.expected_output: A list describing which requirements in the sandbox directory are missing parents.
